name: Steadfast Group Limited
analysis: SDF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.4200. Trade idea: entry A$5.1200, stop A$3.8709, target A$8.8673 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
